---
mode: agent
description: >
  Describe a bug and get a structured diagnosis, root-cause analysis, and targeted fix.
  Routes directly to the bug-fix agent — no spec expansion, no full pipeline.
---

Describe the bug below, then I'll reproduce it, identify the root cause, apply a minimal fix, and verify with tests.

**Bug description:**
${input:describe the bug — what happens, what should happen, and ideally when it was first noticed}

**Affected area (optional):**
${input:page, feature, API endpoint, or file — leave blank if unknown}

**Severity (optional):**
${input:Critical | High | Medium | Low — leave blank to infer from the description}
